title: EarthBound
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro RPG game.

A small suburban kid silhouette with a simple bat-like shape held low in a quiet neighborhood street at night with one glowing crater or meteor-like light source ahead, approaching the strange glow with cautious curiosity.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- weird, curious, quiet

Composition:
- single kid silhouette only, one suburban street read, one glowing crater landmark, and lots of quiet negative space
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Ness likeness, avoid striped shirt codes, avoid Mr. Saturn or enemy silhouettes, avoid exact meteor framing from official art, avoid resemblance to earthbound. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Ness likeness, avoid striped shirt codes, avoid Mr. Saturn or enemy silhouettes, avoid exact meteor framing from official art, avoid resemblance to earthbound
revised_prompt: Imagine a scene in pixel art or stylized rendering inspired by the aesthetics of retro RPG games. The key subject is a solitary silhouette of a suburban child, holding a bat-like object, standing at night on a quiet neighborhood street. A single source of light, emanating from a glowing crater or meteor-like formation, illuminates the area. The image draws out feelings of curiosity and uneasiness, with ample negative space offering a sense of quiet and solitude. It adheres to a clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations and a limited color palette. The background is simple, clutter-free, and featuring a distinctly suburban setting. The objective is high clarity with strong contrast and minimal noise, devoid of text or any watermarks, and steering clear of any resemblance of official characters, logos, or designs to maintain the originality of the artwork.
